prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial begins with a nearly black screen. A small red-and-white watermark or logo is visible in the lower-right corner.

It then cuts to a silver compact sedan driving through a modern city street lined with tall glass-and-concrete buildings. The car is shown from a low front three-quarter angle, moving along a multi-lane urban road in bright daylight.

Next, there is a close-up inside or near a vehicle dashboard area: a hand is holding or inserting a dark disc-shaped object near a black electronic unit with a circular opening and buttons. The exact device is not fully clear from the frame, but it appears to be a car audio or media component.

The commercial returns to exterior driving shots. The same silver sedan is shown from the rear three-quarter view traveling along a city roadway, with high-rise buildings and roadside barriers in the background. Another shot shows the car on a curved or banked-looking road beside a large concrete wall, again in bright daylight. A later shot presents the sedan from the front three-quarter view on a downtown road, with tall buildings behind it.

The final frame is a black promotional end card. At the top is the red KIA logo, followed by the line “Make every mile count.” Large centered text reads: “Starting at $8,235 after $4,000 cash back including $1,000 owner loyalty bonus and $500 military bonus.” Below that, it says “Offer ends soon.” Fine-print legal and offer details appear at the bottom, including a reference to a 2002 Kia model and financing/bonus conditions, though much of the small text is difficult to read clearly. A small red-and-white watermark remains in the lower-right corner.
